why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:cookie_request must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a cookie_request key body decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from runtime cookie storage, cookie request/response behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_cookie_request_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 0, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x00.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: Identifier.parse(String), ClientboundCookieRequestPacket(Identifier), ClientboundCookieRequestPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundCookieRequestPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ClientboundCookieRequestPacket.key().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound cookie_request dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, and ping id 0x05, but not cookie_request id 0x00.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x0 in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound cookie_request packet id 0
